competitor_changes: added support for CSV export of clock-in / clock-out data
current_tool_status: resolved issue with outdated performance review module — now offers continuous feedback and quarterly cycles
resolved issue with no built-in eNPS or pulse survey tooling — now offers eNPS and pulse surveys with automatic reporting
resolved issue with manual setup of onboarding workflows per new hire — now offers templates for automated setup
compliance_changes: PeoplePulse now offers automated GDPR right-to-erasure processing, no longer requiring manual support tickets
notes: competitor's poor fit for knowledge worker / consulting use cases remains unchanged
audit log exportability still not available in PeoplePulse
